All damage taken is split between wearers of this item. ; For this example an attack does 100 damage, Player A's damage mitigation is 70% and Player B's is 50%. ; When A gets hit, the attack is reduced to 30 damage, then gets halved and both players take 15 damage. ; When B gets hit, the attack is reduced to 50 damage, then gets halved and both players take 25 damage. ; If there are 3 Players & A gets hit, the resulting 30 damage will result in each Player taking 10 damage. ; As you can see, it is a good idea for the player with the most damage mitigation to take most of the damage.
